title: Anchorage Digital launches Stablecoin Solutions

title: Crypto lender Ledn issues $188m ABS backed by bitcoin loans
snippet: Crypto lender Ledn has launched its first $188 million of asset backed securities (ABS) with Jefferies as lead manager. Ledn is one of the major players in the bitcoin lending sector dominated by Tether, which also invested in Ledn in late 2025. Given the graveyard of crypto lenders, the first quest

title: Trust Wallet adds cash deposits via Coinme integration
snippet: Coinme, a leading enterprise crypto infrastructure platform, today announced the U.S. launch of its integration with Trust Wallet, the world’s leading self-custody Web3 wallet with over 210 million users, powering the wallet’s new Cash Deposits feature.

title: SEC leaders seek to clarify how tokenized securities interact with existing regulation
snippet: Paul Atkins and Hester Peirce spoke at ETHDenver on Wednesday on the future of regulation at the SEC and its response to crypto market volatility.

title: ProShares seeks stablecoin reserves with GENIUS Act-compliant Treasury ETF
snippet: The ETF invests exclusively in short-term US Treasurys and is structured for potential use by stablecoin issuers under US reserve requirements.

title: Anchorage Digital Links Global Banks to Stablecoin Rails
snippet: Anchorage Digital now enables licensed international banks to access stablecoin rails for U.S. dollar cross-border transfers and settlement. This capability is provided by the company’s new Stablecoin Solutions for Banks, which is a purpose-built offering under U.S. federal oversight, Anchorage Digi

title: SEC’s Peirce and Atkins outline ‘incremental’ path forward for tokenized securities as agency readies innovation exemption
snippet: SEC leadership unveiled details of an innovation exemption, describing it as an incremental step to enable tokenized securities.

title: Tokenized xStocks surpass $25 billion in total transaction volume: Kraken
snippet: This lifetime transaction total includes about $3.5 billion in onchain trading activity across Solana, Ethereum, and TON.

title: Crypto miner Bitdeer tanks 17% after $300M debt offering
snippet: Bitdeer has launched its second-ever convertible senior note offering, which has seen its shares tumble 29% so far this year.

title: Onchain analytics tool Parsec winding down operations
snippet: The onchain analytics startup, launched in early 2021, raised a $1.25 million seed round and a $4 million seed extension.

title: ProShares launches first stablecoin-ready money market ETF under GENIUS Act
snippet: IQMM follows the GENIUS Act’s 93-day Treasury requirement, effectively narrowing reserve management to short-term government paper.

title: Crypto investment firm DBA raises $68 million for its second venture fund
snippet: The firm has invested in infrastructure like DoubleZero and Monad, the stablecoin app Payy, and ICO capital formation platform MetaDAO.

title: Dash Evolution chain integrates Zcash Orchard privacy pool
snippet: Initial features will support basic transfers, setting the stage for subsequent upgrades, including privacy features for tokenized real-world assets.

title: Soil launches RLUSD yield protocol on XRP Ledger, expanding utility for Ripple’s stablecoin
snippet: Soil has launched what it describes as the first compliant real-world asset-backed yield protocol on XRP Ledger for RLUSD.

title: CME Will Make Crypto Derivatives Trading 24/7 in May as Wall Street Eyes Similar Goal
snippet: Top derivatives marketplace CME will adopt 24/7 crypto trading on May 29, pending regulatory approval. The CFTC has indicated it supports such moves.

title: CME targets May launch for 24/7 crypto derivatives trading
snippet: As both the SEC and CFTC explore 24/7 trading hours for US capital markets, several traditional financial exchanges file to expand hours in anticipation of such a move.

title: Deutsche Börse exec says tokenization is an evolution, not a threat
snippet: Carlo Kölzer says tokenization is not threatening but is reshaping traditional markets after the company's 360T platform integrates Kraken-backed xStocks.

title: What Is Base? The Ethereum Layer-2 Network Launched by Coinbase
snippet: Base is designed to house Coinbase’s on-chain products and provide an open ecosystem for dapps, onboarding “billions of users.”

title: CME Group to launch 24/7 crypto futures and options trading on May 29
snippet: CME Group will begin offering 24/7 cryptocurrency futures and options trading on May 29 as volumes hit record highs.

title: Fed’s Kashkari lashes crypto and stablecoins, praises AI
snippet: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says crypto is “utterly useless” compared to AI, and that pro-stablecoin arguments are “a buzzword salad.”

title: Fed's Neel Kashkari calls crypto 'utterly useless,' dismisses stablecoins as 'buzzword salad'

snippet: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Bundesbank President Wants Euro-Pegged Stablecoins to Prevent Dollarization
snippet: ECB Governing Council member Joachim Nagel argued a wholesale CBDC and euro-pegged stablecoins could boost the euro’s international role.

title: Binance extends Trump-linked stablecoin push as Elizabeth Warren fires off anti-crypto salvo
snippet: Binance is extending its promo programme for the Trump family-backed stablecoin as Democrats mount fresh attacks against the crypto industry.

title: Illicit stablecoin activity hit 5-year high of $141B in 2025: TRM Labs
snippet: Sanctions evasion networks, guarantee marketplaces, and large-scale money laundering schemes dominated illicit stablecoin use, says TRM Labs.

title: White House, Banks and Crypto Groups Resume Talks on Stablecoin Rewards
snippet: Stablecoin incentives remain a key unresolved issue as lawmakers seek to advance digital-asset market-structure legislation.

title: Risk-Off Capital Shifts Toward Tokenized Assets as DeFi Pulls Back
snippet: Capital is rotating out of DeFi into tokenized assets as experts say the shift reflects maturing markets, not capitulation.

title: Ripple CEO confirms White House meeting between crypto, banking reps
snippet: Trump administration officials held a similar event last week to discuss stablecoin yield within a market structure bill under consideration in Congress.

title: Anchorage Digital offers non-U.S. banks a stablecoin stand-in for correspondent banking
White House floats limited stablecoin rewards in third crypto, bank meeting
snippet: White House crypto adviser Patrick Witt reportedly refocused crypto and bank lobby talks on a crypto bill to allow stablecoin rewards tied to transaction activity.

title: Inside the meeting: White House favors some stablecoin rewards, tells banks it's time to move
‘More to come,’ crypto leaders say after third White House stablecoin meeting
snippet: "More to come," was the main message coming out of the third meeting between crypto and banking groups at the White House.
